speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And that wraps up another edition of ParkSyde Bright Side! From deep-sea discoveries to sporting heroes, peace talks to scientific breakthroughs - the world's full of reasons to be optimistic.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] Absolutely! It just goes to show that when you shift your focus to the good stuff happening around us, there's actually heaps to celebrate. Tomorrow we'll be back with more uplifting stories to brighten your day.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Until then, keep spreading those good vibes, look after each other, and remember - every day's a gift, that's why they call it the present! This has been Alex Mercer...

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] And Jamie, reminding you to stay positive, stay curious, and keep celebrating the bright side of life! From all of us here at ParkSyde, have a beautiful day Queensland!

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Catch you tomorrow for more good news, and remember - the sun's always shining somewhere! Cheers!
